issues.observation: A visible kink or sharp transition exists at the junction between the upward bend (M2) and the rising spiral (M3) in the front and back views, violating the design note to maintain smooth tangent continuity between all sections.

The contract specifies 1 expected open port and the step map indicates that M1.in should be closed (open_now: false), but View 6 clearly shows the inlet port at M1 is open, resulting in an assembly with 2 open ports.
